title: immersion in traffic context
description: Adds customizable barriers & asphalt roads (+30% speed!). Design unique streets, works with/without Ultimate Car Mod. Survival recipes included. Build realistic traffic systems!
body:
# _∑How to Use This Mod? >_

This mod adds various road blocks to Minecraft, making the game more interesting.

When walking on them, you will notice a significant increase in speed, and you can even jump higher.

This mod also adds many minerals. The 1.20.1 version has been discontinued due to element conflicts and other issues. The mod will follow Minecraft's update pace, with long-term support for more classic versions.

The author recommends using this mod alongside Just Enough Items (JEI), The One Probe (TOP), and transportation-related mods for a better experience.

New elements will continue to be added to ensure the mod's replayability.

# _**✅** Features_

Walking on asphalt blocks increases movement speed to 1.3 times that of regular blocks.

Choose the block shape you prefer — turn left, turn right, and more. It's all up to you.

All mod blocks are craftable in Survival mode.

## **_📖_** _Finally：_
   **After completing the car,you come to this step:you have a variety of options to design your own street and unleash your creativity!**

# _Mod Loader Compatibility_

This mod is developed for Forge. Fabric and other mod loaders are not natively supported, but you can use a connector mod to load it on those platforms. Support for behavior packs and data packs may be added in the future, though it is unlikely.
